root.name: Mathematical Disciplines (MSC2020)
root.description: The mathematical sciences organized by the Mathematics Subject Classification 2020 — 52 core-mathematics disciplines from number theory and algebraic geometry through functional analysis, topology, probability and numerical analysis. Physics-applied MSC classes live in the Physics cluster; this branch is pure and applied mathematics proper.
